title: Sunburn
description: When exposed to the sun you get sunburns and take damage
body:
# Sunburn – Meme Datapack
Try to beat the game with this datapack on single biome desert, if you do so _post a video._
**The sun is no longer your friend.** Step outside without shade and get roasted like a baked potato.  

---

## 🔥 Features
- Stay under the sun too long and get damaged
- True gamer vampire lifestyle (sun = pain)  
- Desert survival = nightmare fuel  

---

⚠️ **Warning:** This pack makes Minecraft more *realistic* than sunscreen commercials.  
☠️ *You thought phantoms were bad? Wait until the sun itself hates you.*
